creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Clang 3.4 now stops with an error on unknown options (or is it just some options?)

I don't see any problems removing the -fno-implement-inlines option. It shouldn't cause a problem with other compiler or older versions of clang.

Attaching an update patch that removes the -fno-implement-inlines from CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS
